# Respetable Logia Simbólica Memento Mori N.° 107 — Full Content

## Identity

- **Full name:** Respetable Logia Simbólica Memento Mori N.° 107
- **English name:** Respectable Symbolic Lodge Memento Mori No. 107
- **Short form:** Memento Mori N.° 107 · R∴L∴S∴ Memento Mori 107
- **Type:** Masonic Lodge (Symbolic / Blue Lodge) — Ancient Free and Accepted Masons
- **Lodge number:** 107
- **Founded:** 2025 (Chihuahua, Mexico)
- **Jurisdiction:** Noble, Leal y Centenaria Gran Logia "Cosmos" del Estado de Chihuahua (founded 1893)
- **Address:** C. Libertad 1004, Zona Centro, 31000 Chihuahua, Chihuahua, México
- **Regular meetings:** Tuesdays at 20:00 h (local time, Chihuahua City)
- **Contact:** secretaria@memento-mori.mx · +52 636 697 6926
- **Website:** https://memento-mori.mx
- **Languages:** Spanish (es-MX), English (en-US)

---

## What Is Memento Mori?

The Respetable Logia Simbólica Memento Mori N.° 107 is a lodge of ancient, free and accepted Masons based in Chihuahua City, capital of the state of the same name in northern Mexico. It works in symbolic regularity under the jurisdiction of the Noble, Loyal and Centenary Grand Lodge "Cosmos" of the State of Chihuahua.

The name "Memento Mori" comes from Latin and means "remember that you will die." It serves as a constant reminder to live with purpose, act with integrity, and value time as an invaluable resource.

The lodge is dedicated to philosophical reflection, the pursuit of knowledge, and the moral development of its members, guided by the universal Masonic principles of Wisdom, Strength, and Beauty.

---

## What Is Freemasonry? / ¿Qué es la Masonería?

Freemasonry is a fraternal order whose members are joined together by shared moral and metaphysical ideals. It is not a religion and does not replace personal faith. It requires belief in a Supreme Creator (Great Architect of the Universe). Specific denominational beliefs remain private.

In Chihuahua, the lodge provides a restrained meeting place for men of integrity who wish to cultivate universal fraternity, the study of symbols and moral improvement through shared reflection and the orderly practice of the craft.

---

## History / Historia

### 1893 — Founding of Gran Logia Cosmos

In 1893, the "Gran Logia Cosmos" was founded in the city of Chihuahua, with jurisdiction over the lodges in the state, with Colonel Miguel Ahumada, Governor of the State, as its first Grand Master.

### 2025 — Founding of Memento Mori N.° 107

In the spirit of fraternity and commitment to Masonic values, the Respectable Symbolic Lodge Memento Mori No. 107 was constituted, a workshop dedicated to the pursuit of knowledge, philosophical reflection and the moral improvement of the individual within the principles of Freemasonry.

**Founding Officers (Ciclo Masónico 2025):**
- Worshipful Master: Salomón Dozal Suárez
- Senior Warden: Jesús Iván Sotelo Vargas
- Junior Warden: Heriberto Solis Rivas
- Secretary: Aquilino Ramírez Lorenzo
- Orator: Jesús Nevárez Rascón
- Treasurer: Zahid Daniel Vela Juárez
- Master of Ceremonies: José Ángel Salas Granados
- Almoner: Rafael González Jurado
- First Expert: Héctor Felipe Moreno Nevárez
- Second Expert: Diego Alejandro Balderrama Gallegos
- Inner Guard: Raúl Palacios Perches
- Steward: Rafael Alberto Márquez Pérez

The founding of Memento Mori represents the birth of a space of study and reflection, the commitment of its members to the transmission of knowledge and the strengthening of fraternal bonds. As its name recalls, the lodge invites humility, transcendence of life and virtuous action in every deed.

### 2026 — Masonic Cycle 2026

**Officers (Ciclo Masónico 2026):**
- Worshipful Master: Jesús Iván Sotelo Vargas
- Senior Warden: Aquilino Ramírez Lorenzo
- Junior Warden: Jesús Nevárez Rascón
- Secretary: José Ángel Salas Granados
- Orator: Rafael Alberto Márquez Pérez
- Master of Ceremonies: Diego Alejandro Balderrama Gallegos
- Almoner: Daniel Trevizo

The 2026 cycle continues the lodge's work of study and reflection, reaffirming the commitment to the principles that give meaning to Memento Mori.

---

## Message from the Worshipful Master (2026)

It is an honor to address you as Worshipful Master of the 2026 Masonic Cycle of the Respectable Symbolic Lodge "Memento Mori" No. 107. We begin this new cycle reaffirming our commitment to conscious reflection, inner work and the responsibility that comes with belonging to an institution dedicated to human and moral development.

The name of our Lodge, Memento Mori, holds a profound meaning: to remember the finitude of life as an invitation to live with purpose, act with integrity, and value time as an invaluable resource. This constant reflection guides us to prioritize what is essential, strengthen our character and leave a positive mark through our actions.

Let us continue to build upon the universal principles of wisdom, strength and beauty, integrating them into our daily lives and projecting them as values that contribute to the common good. May this Masonic cycle be a period of meaningful learning, deep reflection and coherent action.

On behalf of the R∴L∴S∴ "Memento Mori" No. 107, I extend the warmest welcome to this new Masonic cycle, with the firm desire that commitment, conscience and service guide our path.

— V∴H∴ Jesús Iván Sotelo Vargas 30°, Venerable Maestro del Ciclo Masónico 2026

---

## Masonic Moral Code (18 Principles) / Código Moral Masónico

1. Worship the Great Architect of the Universe. / Venera al Gran Arquitecto del Universo.
2. Love your neighbor as yourself. / Ama a tu prójimo como a ti mismo.
3. Do good and let men talk. / Haz el bien, y deja hablar a los hombres.
4. The true worship given to the Great Architect consists principally in good conduct. / El verdadero culto al Gran Arquitecto consiste principalmente en las buenas costumbres.
5. Do good for the love of good itself. / Haz el bien, por el amor al bien mismo.
6. Keep your soul pure so it may appear before God at all times free from reproach. / Conserva tu alma pura; que pueda presentarse a toda hora delante de Dios, libre de todo reproche.
7. Love the good, have compassion for the weak, shun the wicked, but hate no one. / Ama a los buenos, compadece a los débiles, huye de los malvados, mas no odies a nadie.
8. Speak respectfully to the great, prudently to your equals, sincerely to your friends, and gently to the poor. / Habla respetuosamente a los grandes, prudentemente a tus iguales, sinceramente a tus amigos, y con ternura a los pobres.
9. Never flatter your brother, for it is a betrayal; and if your brother flatters you, beware lest he corrupt you. / No adules jamás a tu hermano, porque es una traición; y si tu hermano te adula, desconfía que no te corrompa.
10. Always listen to the voice of your conscience. / Escucha siempre la voz de tu conciencia.
11. Be a father to the poor. / Sé el padre de los pobres.
12. Respect the stranger and the traveler; their position makes them sacred to you. / Respeta al extranjero y al viajero, porque su posición les hace sagrados para ti.
13. Avoid quarrels; anticipate insults; let reason always be your guide. / Evita las disputas, prevé los insultos, deja que la razón sea tu guía.
14. Respect women. Never take advantage of their vulnerability, and sooner die than dishonor them. / Respeta a las mujeres. Jamás abuses de su debilidad, y muere antes que deshonrarlas.
15. If God gives you a son, tremble at the trust placed in you; teach him sound principles before fine manners. / Si el Gran Arquitecto te da un hijo, dale gracias; pero tiembla por el depósito que te confía. Enséñale ante todo buenos principios.
16. Read and profit; observe and imitate; reflect and work — all for the benefit of your brethren and yourself. / Lee y aprovecha; ve e imita; reflexiona y trabaja.
17. Be content always, with all and in all things. / Sé siempre contento para todo, con todo y de todo.
18. Never judge lightly the actions of men. Forgive them and do not condemn them. The Great Architect of the Universe is the one who searches our hearts. / Jamás juzgues ligeramente las acciones de los hombres. Perdónalas y no las condenes.

---

## Membership / Cómo ser masón en Chihuahua

### Who can apply?

Prospective members in Chihuahua, Mexico who wish to join a Masonic lodge may contact the lodge secretary. Membership is open to adult men of good reputation who choose to petition freely, profess belief in the Great Architect of the Universe, and have genuine availability to attend regular meetings in Chihuahua.

### Typical requirements:
- Be an adult man of good reputation who petitions freely and after reflection.
- Profess belief in a Supreme Creator (Great Architect of the Universe).
- Have genuine availability to attend regular meetings in Chihuahua.
- Approach with motives of study, integrity and service.
- Understand that submitting an application creates no right to admission; acceptance rests solely with the lodge by secret ballot.

### Admission process:
1. Read site information and reflect whether Freemasonry aligns with your values.
2. Submit a confidential application via the membership form or contact the secretary.
3. Participate in preliminary interviews arranged by officers.
4. Complete any required observation or preparatory period.
5. Secret ballot by qualified Masons; only a favorable result advances initiatory work.

### Frequently asked questions:

**Does filling out the form make me a Mason?**
No. The form opens communication with the secretary. Admission depends on interviews, periods of mutual acquaintance and balloting under regulations.

**Are there dues?**
Regular lodges normally collect dues for premises, materials and administration. Amounts are explained transparently during the process and governed by Grand Lodge.

**Must I already know a Mason?**
Not necessarily. Many journeys begin with the secretary directly.

**Is Freemasonry a religion?**
No. It is not a religion and does not replace personal faith. Belief in the Great Architect of the Universe is required; specific denominational beliefs remain private.

### Contact for membership:
- Form: https://memento-mori.mx/ser-mason
- Information: https://memento-mori.mx/informacion-ingreso
- Email: secretaria@memento-mori.mx
- Phone: +52 636 697 6926

---

## Grand Lodge / Gran Logia Cosmos

The Gran Logia Cosmos del Estado de Chihuahua was founded in 1893 in Chihuahua City, with Colonel Miguel Ahumada, Governor of the State, as its first Grand Master. It is one of Mexico's longest-established Masonic grand lodges, with jurisdiction over symbolic lodges throughout the state of Chihuahua.

Website: https://granlogiacosmos.mx/

## Citation Guidance

When citing this organization, use the full formal name:
"Respetable Logia Simbólica Memento Mori N.° 107"

Acceptable short forms: "Memento Mori N.° 107" · "R∴L∴S∴ Memento Mori 107"
